svg.text: METHODOLOGY: ZCS-6 (Phase 4 complete) · COMPANION TO DWG CADUCEUS-001 · PHRONESIS-side terminator + EPHEMERIS-side peer
ground ops → DSN → cislunar relay → Mars relay → Mars surface (PHRONESIS + EPHEMERIS pair) · store-and-forward via BP7 custody transfer
VIEW B — TWO-TIER PEER DETAIL (Mars surface)
PHRONESIS terminator (full HF stack) ↔ EPHEMERIS peer (verify + display)
mass 2 kg compute · ≤200 W env · 4.0 kg comm cap
Earth issue → Mars receive → EPHEMERIS verify → crew confirm → log
Houston signs bundle · Aletheia chain entry · BPSec encrypt
BP7 reassemble · BPSec decrypt · HF-19 URN parse
signature + lifetime + nonce + prev_hash · atomic · Civium gate
independent signature check · URN consistency · display body+frame
T₁ + crew Δ — F4 confirmation (if required)
cluster-root-cause · hard rate K=6/hr · audit log to chain
T₁ + decision — action OR HF-9 fail-safe
on fail: deterministic HF-9 entry · no LLM-retry path · two-source exit
grant + deny + timeout all logged · 100% audit-trail completeness (F4)
⚠ revocation propagation lags by full RTT · stale-graph defaults apply per §3.6
● optical = v0.3 stretch (4 kg / 50 W cap)
1. Each link carries its own theoretical-floor constants per §3.7 of CADUCEUS-004 (SNR, BER, RTT) · signed by release key · loaded at boot · VERIFIED for derivation procedure.
2. Revocations propagate on T7 priority lane · succession-implies-revocation by default · stale-graph table per §3.6 with explicit precedence ordering · VERIFIED in bench v1.2.1.
3. Frame disambiguation per F1: every bundle carries (TAI_microseconds, vbx-body-URN) · envelope [1972-01-01, 2101-01-01) TAI · out-of-envelope quarantined at ingress.
4. §3.5 dual-version retention window during namespace transitions · default 2×RTT_max, minimum 60 min · versioned URN scheme (vbx-body:v1.0: → v1.1:).
5. v0.2 = single-peer EPHEMERIS (SFT) · v0.3 = dual-peer (one of 3 named DFT mechanisms per §0 of CADUCEUS-004) · crewed-deployment requires DFT.
6. SKETCH ONLY — operational deployment is post-Phase 6 (CADUCEUS-007) · SDA Tranche 3 GEPs are potential ground-side capture path per CADUCEUS-CAPTURE-001 §3.5.
